description: Search, read, and automate TextMine documents, records, workflows, integrations, and agent tasks.
name: com.textmine/textmine-mcp

headers.description: Bearer TextMine API key, for example Bearer tm_<key>. Create or request a key through agent self-service signup or TextMine support.
headers.name: Authorization

headers.description: Optional TextMine MCP application adapter id, for example copilot-studio for Copilot Studio surfaces. Omit unless TextMine or the client setup guide requires a specific adapter.
headers.name: X-TextMine-Application

title: TextMine MCP
